name: ruby-faraday
title: ruby-faraday
description:
HTTP/REST API client library
Faraday is an HTTP client lib that provides a common
interface over many adapters (such as Net::HTTP) and embraces the
concept of Rack middleware when processing the request/response cycle.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-faraday because HTTP/REST API client library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-faraday as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-faraday with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-faraday --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
